              Summary
              Versatile and experienced Software Engineer with a demonstrated history of solving
              complex problems in the oil & energy industry, later shifting to cloud reliability and
              high-scale products in a tech-first company.

              Experience
QuintoAndar Senior Staff Software Engineer, Mar 2024–Present, São Paulo, Brazil.
              Working on high-scale reliability and software engineering challenges for a tech-first real
              estate platform.
QuintoAndar Staff Software Engineer, Jun 2023–Mar 2024, São Paulo, Brazil.
QuintoAndar Head of Engineering, Nov 2021–Jun 2023, São Paulo, Brazil.
QuintoAndar Senior Site Reliability Engineering Manager, Mar 2021–Nov 2021, São Paulo,
            Brazil.
QuintoAndar Site Reliability Engineering Manager, Sep 2020–Mar 2021, São Paulo, Brazil.
QuintoAndar Senior Site Reliability Engineer, Jul 2019–Sep 2020, São Paulo, Brazil.
QuintoAndar Senior Software Engineer, Dec 2018–Jul 2019, São Paulo, Brazil.
    Cegal AS Senior Software Engineer, Jun 2017–Dec 2018, Oslo, Norway.
              Working on software for Oil & Gas exploration and production for Petrel E&P Software
              Platform using mostly C#.
              Developer on Blueback BluePrint, an automatic and customizable reporting tool for complex
              exploration data, and other service projects for external clients.
              Part of the development of Blueback Rocks Velocity, a versatile seismic velocity tool used
              for processing and analysis; Blueback Toolbox, a best-selling pack with dozens of products
              encompassing most areas of oil exploration and production; and Blueback Investigator, a
              powerful cross-domain multi-dimensional data analysis tool.
    Cegal AS Software Engineer, Apr 2015–Jun 2017, Oslo, Norway.
Geo Imaging Research Software Engineer, Jul 2013–Apr 2015, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
  Solutions, Research projects on high end geophysical imaging using high performance computing for
        Inc. Oil & Gas industry.
              Integration of Full Waveform Inversion (FWI) and Reverse-time Migration (RTM) and other
              signal processing algorithms using C++ and Fortran with Big Data on Linux HPC clusters.
Schlumberger Software Engineer, Dec 2010–Jun 2013, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
       - SIS Design and development of new products and technologies of software for Oil & Gas
              exploration and production, particularly on geophysical tools for Petrel E&P Software
              Platform. Comprehensive desktop programming experience using Fortran, C, C++ (CLI
              and native), C# and Java and integrating 40 years old legacy code to .NET applications.

             Education

             Publications
     2010 ViCOS - Virtual Cluster Orchestration System, CLCAR - Latin American
          Conference on High Performance Computing, ISBN 978-85-7727-252-5.
             An environment aware load balancing virtual cluster system that coordinates virtual machines
             that offer some service (HPC, SOA, etc) in a failover cluster, making a multipurpose envi-
             ronment which the main goal is to reduce the wasting of the infrastructure’s computational
             potential.
